holdings.infoBox: NFTY is an equity ETF with a total of 52 individual holdings. The top holdings are Adani Enterprises stock at 3.01%, Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone at 2.50%, Trent at 2.40%, Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles at 2.37%, and Grasim Industries at 2.31%.

overview.description: The First Trust India NIFTY 50 Equal Weight ETF (NFTY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NIFTY 50 Equal Weight index. The fund tracks an equally weighted index of the 50 largest and most liquid Indian equity securities. NFTY was launched on Feb 14, 2012 and is issued by First Trust.
